tasks.label: Compile Active GLSL Shader to SPIR-V
args: ext="${fileExtname}"; ext="${ext#.}"; case "$ext" in vert|frag|comp|geom|tesc|tese|mesh|task|rgen|rchit|rahit|rmiss|rint|rcall) stage="$ext" ;; *) echo "Unsupported shader extension: ${fileExtname}" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac; glslc -g -fshader-stage="$stage" "${file}" -o "${file}.spv" -std=450core
